text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Mile Championship on the horizon, Taiki
Shuttle seeks to make a bigger name for herself in
order to become Umamusume of the Year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the midst of this, she is met with a challenge
from Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Taiki can steal the hearts of the fans by beating
the unstoppable force that is Silence Suzuka, she
just might be able to clinch the title.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle's chances of becoming Umamusume
of the Year hinge on winning the Mile
Championship!
